docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TODD, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-23-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-10-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TODD, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERGUSON, BILL $2,320.00 PRINCIPAL, $303.92 INTEREST, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,662.92, JUDGMT SHALL BE SUSPENDED IF DEFT DOES THE FF: PAY PLTF $100 EVERY 2 WKS COMMENCING 4/15/94 & STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
